lore.english:
Taimanin. Due to a curse inflicted by a demon she once fought, which is slowly taking over her, she sometimes becomes violent like a werewolf and starts destroying everything in her path. Because of this, she uses a specially formulated sedative from Gosha to suppress those impulses while carrying out missions, all the while seeking a way to break the curse.

The only daughter of a priest family and raised as its heir, she is not cute, but speaks and acts with calmness and kindness. However, as a sheltered young lady, she is often naïve about the ways of the world, which leads her teammates to tease her frequently.

A Wind Art user, she combines the physical prowess of a wolf with Wind Art to excel in high‑mobility combat, wielding both a short katana and a demon‑piercing bow to employ versatile tactics unconstrained by distance.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&CRI_RATE] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase CRIT Rate of Technique allies by 30% in Tactical Training
skills.description_readable: Increase CRIT Rate of Technique allies by 30% in Tactical Training

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wind Bow: Soaring Wolf[-]
skills.description:
Jumps up into the air and fires a powerful shot at the enemy.
If the target's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]80%[-] or more, removes [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [V3:1140102] [&Buff] the target has.
skills.description_readable:
Jumps up into the air and fires a powerful shot at the enemy.
If the target's HP is 80% or more, removes Random 1 Buff the target has.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wind Bow: Ravenous Wolf[-]
skills.description:
Shoots arrows at a fast pace, firing 5 in total at the enemy.
On every attack, reduces the duration of  [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [V3:1140202] [&Buff](s) the target has by [V2:1140202] turn(s) at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1140202]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Shoots arrows at a fast pace, firing 5 in total at the enemy.
On every attack, reduces the duration of  Random 1 Buff(s) the target has by -1 turn(s) at a 15% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Cursed Wolf Taimanin[-]
skills.description: When the target doesn't have a [&Buff] upon attack, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1140301]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp].
skills.description_readable: When the target doesn't have a Buff upon attack, performs a (15%) Life Steal.
